2.title: Kubernetes: Cluster readyz status
2.query:
timeseries readyz = avg(dt.kubernetes.cluster.readyz),
  by: { dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster }
| fieldsAdd kubernetes_cluster_name = entityName(dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster)
| sort arrayAvg(readyz) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Kubernetes: Container count
3.query:
timeseries containers = avg(dt.kubernetes.containers),
  by: { dt.entity.cloud_application }
| fieldsAdd cloud_application_name = entityName(dt.entity.cloud_application)
| sort arrayAvg(containers) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Kubernetes: Container - restart count
4.query:
timeseries restarts = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.restarts),
  by: { dt.entity.cloud_application_instance }
| fieldsAdd cloud_application_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.cloud_application_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(restarts) desc
| limit 20
